result.evidence_summary: No evidence found of a 'Cradle Mountain Classic' cross-country ski race. Search results mention a Cradle Mountain Run (trail running event)[1][2][6] and general cross-country skiing possibilities at Cradle Mountain[3][7], but no organized ski race by that name, no results, no official site, no news, no social media, no videos, and no listings in Worldloppet or similar.
